rules.rule_text:
rule shell_functions
{
	meta:
		author = "@patrickrolsen"
		version = "0.1"
		data = "08/19/2014"
		reference = "N/A"

	strings:
		$s1 = "function listDatabases()"
		$s2 = "function dropDatabase()"
		$s3 = "mysql_drop_db("
		$s4 = "function listTables()"
		$s5 = "passthru($cmd)"
		$s6 = "function check_file()"
		$s7 = "$id==\"fake-mail\""
		$s8 = "Shell_Exec($cmd)"
		$s9 = "move_uploaded_file("

	condition:
		not uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and any of ( $s* )
}
